title: T-063 — Cross-module event contract pin: warehouse.grn.* → quality.inspection auto-create (packages/events only)
prompt:
# T-063 — Cross-module event schema pin: GRN → Quality

PRD: §12.1 inbound consumers table (grn.received entry), §7.1 09-c-05 (GRN outbox consumer scope)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Pin the cross-module event contract between 05-WH and 09-QA for GRN-driven auto-inspection. Owner of the producer side is 05-WH; this task only declares the typed event contract in `packages/events` and asserts that 09-QA's grn_outbox_consumer (T-030 / T-041) consumes it via the canonical Zod validator. Out-of-scope: any 05-WH implementation.

## Implementation contract
1. packages/events/src/warehouse/grn.ts: WarehouseGrnReceivedEvent, WarehouseGrnFailedEvent (the latter consumed by T-041). Required fields: {tenant_id (org_id), grn_id, grn_number, supplier_id, po_id?, lines[]:{item_id, batch_lp_id, qty_kg, inspection_required:boolean}, received_at, received_by, occurred_at, idempotency_key}.
2. Zod validators export from same file.
3. packages/events/src/index.ts barrel export.
4. Contract test in packages/events/__tests__/warehouse-grn-events.test.ts asserts both event shapes pass for canonical fixture and fail without required fields.
5. apps/web/src/server/quality/grn/outboxConsumer.ts (T-041 file) modified to import + validate via the canonical Zod validator instead of any ad-hoc shape.

## Files
- packages/events/src/warehouse/grn.ts [create]
- packages/events/src/index.ts [modify]
- packages/events/__tests__/warehouse-grn-events.test.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/grn/outboxConsumer.ts [modify]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the events package built, when imported, then WarehouseGrnReceivedEvent + WarehouseGrnFailedEvent are exported with required {tenant_id, grn_id, grn_number, lines[], received_at, received_by, occurred_at, idempotency_key} and runtime Zod validators
2. Given a fixture missing tenant_id, when the Zod validator runs, then it rejects with 'tenant_id required'
3. Given the 09-QA grn_outbox_consumer (T-041), when an event is received, then it MUST validate via the canonical Zod validator before any DB write; the test asserts that calling the consumer with a payload missing required fields results in a logged rejection AND no quality_inspections / ncr_reports row is created
4. Given the contract is owned by packages/events, when 05-WH module (out-of-scope for this task) implements the producer, then it MUST import from packages/events/warehouse/grn — this task asserts the import path and the Zod validator are the single source of truth (audit A §1 cross-module event contract pin)

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: warehouse-grn-events.test.ts asserting all 4 ACs before code
- Run 'pnpm --filter events build && pnpm --filter events test && pnpm --filter web test grn/outboxConsumer'

## Risk red lines
- 05-WH implementation is OUT-OF-SCOPE — this task only ships the contract in packages/events
- Do not duplicate the event shape in apps/web — single source of truth in packages/events (audit A §1)
- All events MUST carry tenant_id for RLS resolution downstream (Wave0 v4.3)
- Do not change canonical event names — warehouse.grn.received / warehouse.grn.failed

pipeline_inputs.description: Pin the canonical event contract for warehouse.grn.* in packages/events with Zod validators and require T-041 grn_outbox_consumer to validate via the contract before any DB write. 05-WH producer side is out-of-scope.
pipeline_inputs.details: Two typed events (WarehouseGrnReceivedEvent, WarehouseGrnFailedEvent) declared in packages/events/src/warehouse/grn.ts with Zod validators. Required fields: tenant_id (org_id for RLS), grn_id, grn_number, supplier_id, po_id?, lines[]:{item_id, batch_lp_id, qty_kg, inspection_required}, received_at, received_by, occurred_at, idempotency_key. apps/web/src/server/quality/grn/outboxConsumer.ts imports the validator; payload that fails Zod is logged-rejected and no DB write occurs. 05-WH producer implementation is out-of-scope — this task only pins the contract. Audit A §1 cross-module event contract pin is satisfied. PRD anchors verified: §12.1 inbound consumers table lists 'grn.received (05-WH)' → 'auto-create quality_inspections per items.inspection_required'; §7.1 09-c-05 'auto-create on GRN outbox consumer + sampling plan selector'; §9.1 RLS pattern (tenant_id flows to app.current_org_id()).
out_of_scope: Do not implement 05-WH producer side (out-of-scope; owned by 05-WH)
Do not duplicate the event shape in apps/web (single source of truth in packages/events)
Do not implement new quality_inspections schema (T-025 owner)
acceptance_criteria: Given the events package built, when imported, then WarehouseGrnReceivedEvent + WarehouseGrnFailedEvent are exported with required {tenant_id, grn_id, grn_number, lines[], received_at, received_by, occurred_at, idempotency_key} and Zod validators
Given a payload missing tenant_id, when the Zod validator runs, then it rejects with 'tenant_id required'

Given the 09-QA grn_outbox_consumer, when an event is received, then it validates via the canonical Zod validator before any DB write; a malformed payload results in logged rejection AND zero quality_inspections / ncr_reports rows

Given the canonical contract lives in packages/events, when a grep test scans apps/web for ad-hoc grn event shapes, then no duplicate type exists outside packages/events (single source of truth assertion)
test_strategy: RED: warehouse-grn-events.test.ts + grep-style test in apps/web/__tests__/contracts/no-duplicate-grn-event.test.ts asserting all 4 ACs before code
Run 'pnpm --filter events build && pnpm --filter events test && pnpm --filter web test grn/outboxConsumer'
risk_red_lines: 05-WH implementation is OUT-OF-SCOPE — this task only ships the contract in packages/events
Single source of truth in packages/events (audit A §1)
All events carry tenant_id for downstream RLS (Wave0 v4.3)
Canonical names: warehouse.grn.received / warehouse.grn.failed — do not change
